message:
fix(equality): Add PyComplex support and cross-type numeric comparison

Root cause fix for equality comparisons:
- PyValue.from() now correctly handles PyComplex structs (was returning .none)
- pyValueEql() now handles cross-type numeric comparisons:
  - complex vs int/float/bool
  - int vs float/bool
  - float vs bool
- Add bigint comparison support

This fixes test_complex in test_bool.py (complex(False) == 0j, etc.)
